pkgmetadata.longdescription: Python-Multipart.. image httpsgithub.comandrew-dpython-multipartactionsworkflowstest.yamlbadge.svg target httpsgithub.comandrew-dpython-multipartactionspython-multipart is an Apache2 licensed streaming multipart parser for Python.Test coverage is currently 100.Documentation is available here_... _here httpsandrew-d.github.iopython-multipartWhy----Because streaming uploads are awesome for large files.How to Test-----------If you want to test.. code-block bash pip install .[dev] inv test
